_note: PII-free family print config. The 5:30am print run renders in a fresh browser with no saved state, so this committed file is how the daily pack tracks real family life: keep the race date, life events and print difficulty current (edit + push, live in ~90s). On the kids' devices it fills gaps only - their own toggles and progress always win. NEVER put names, birthdays or a school in this file: the repo is public.
